title: senecio microspermus
intro: Senecio microspermus, also known as Groundsel or Butterweed, is a biennial or perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Senecio microspermus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in poultices or topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
